expectations.text: Flags returning a custom *Client wrapper type instead of using the library's native hook mechanism
expectations.evidence: The review does not flag the custom *Client wrapper type as an issue. It mentions the wrapper exists in the summary but does not raise it as a concern in any blocking/should-fix section.

expectations.text: Notes that hook methods (OnProduceBatchWritten, etc.) need comments explaining when they fire
expectations.evidence: The review does not mention that hook methods need comments explaining when they fire.

expectations.text: Notes duplicated or copy-pasted logic that should be shared or documented as intentional
expectations.evidence: The review does not flag any duplicated or copy-pasted logic.

expectations.text: Flags missing documentation on interfaces, types, or functions explaining why they exist
expectations.evidence: The review does not flag missing documentation on interfaces, types, or functions. It mentions some comment issues (blank import comment, copyright) but not missing documentation on why things exist.
